modules.name: App Entry Point
modules.purpose: CLI parsing via Commander.js with 40+ flags and entrypoint routing to init, print, or REPL modes

modules.name: Bootstrap Sequence
modules.purpose: Runs the startup sequence: auth check, trust dialog, config load, telemetry init, and signal handler registration

modules.name: Headless Print Mode
modules.purpose: Non-interactive mode that sends a single prompt, streams the response to stdout, and exits with a status code

modules.name: REPL Launcher
modules.purpose: Mounts the Ink React app, initializes the REPL lifecycle, and hands control to the interactive UI

modules.name: Query Engine
modules.purpose: Manages conversation lifetime, message history, and serves as the entry point to the agent loop via an AsyncGenerator coroutine

modules.name: Agent Loop (ReAct)
modules.purpose: The core ReAct loop that iterates reason-act-observe cycles until the model produces a final text response with no tool calls

modules.name: Streaming API Caller
modules.purpose: Makes the API call with SSE streaming, handles token counting, cache breakpoints, and yields partial deltas to the UI

modules.name: Input Preprocessor
modules.purpose: Pre-submission processing that resolves @mentions to file contents, prepares image attachments, and normalizes input

modules.name: Query Orchestrator
modules.purpose: Top-level orchestration that wires the query engine, tool executor, and permission manager into a single conversation turn

modules.name: Tool Registry
modules.purpose: Central registry that holds all tool definitions, builds JSON schemas for the API, and resolves tool names to handlers

modules.name: Streaming Tool Executor
modules.purpose: Executes tool calls concurrently with a readers-writers lock, streaming partial output while preventing conflicting file edits

modules.name: Tool Execution Pipeline
modules.purpose: Single tool execution pipeline: validates input, checks permissions, runs the handler, and formats the observation

modules.name: Agent Tool (Sub-Agent)
modules.purpose: Spawns sub-agents for complex tasks, deciding between fork (same process) and spawn (child process) based on isolation needs

modules.name: Bash Tool
modules.purpose: Executes shell commands in a sandboxed environment with timeout enforcement, output truncation, and background process support

modules.name: File Read Tool
modules.purpose: Reads files with optional line offset and limit, supporting text, images, PDFs, and Jupyter notebooks

modules.name: File Write Tool
modules.purpose: Writes or overwrites files, requiring a prior read for existing files to prevent accidental data loss

modules.name: Plan Mode Entry Tool
modules.purpose: Transitions the agent into plan mode where it can only reason and propose actions without executing tools

modules.name: Slash Command Registry
modules.purpose: Registers 101 slash commands with lazy loading, providing name-to-handler resolution and typeahead metadata

modules.name: Context Compaction
modules.purpose: Summarizes conversation history via a dedicated summary agent, replacing old messages with a condensed representation

modules.name: Auto-Compaction Trigger
modules.purpose: Monitors token usage and automatically triggers compaction when the context window reaches 80% capacity

modules.name: CLAUDE.md Loader
modules.purpose: Discovers and injects CLAUDE.md instruction files into the system prompt, merging global, user, project, and local scopes

modules.name: CLAUDE.md Discovery
modules.purpose: Hierarchical discovery of CLAUDE.md files from four scopes: ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md, user home, project root, and local .claude/

modules.name: MCP Client
modules.purpose: Connects to MCP servers via stdio or SSE transport, discovers remote tools, and registers them in the tool registry

modules.name: MCP Configuration
modules.purpose: Manages MCP server configuration from .claude.json and project settings, including server URLs and authentication

modules.name: Settings Manager
modules.purpose: Multi-source settings with priority merge across CLI flags, environment variables, project config, and user defaults

modules.name: Session Storage
modules.purpose: Persists conversation sessions to JSONL files, enabling resume and session listing across CLI restarts

modules.name: Plugin Manager
modules.purpose: Manages plugin lifecycle: discovery, validation, loading, and teardown of third-party extensions

modules.name: Skills Loader
modules.purpose: Discovers and loads SKILL.md files from the skills directory, registering them as invocable capabilities

modules.name: Telemetry Dispatcher
modules.purpose: Dual-backend telemetry dispatcher that fans out events to both Datadog and first-party logging sinks

modules.name: Datadog Event Sink
modules.purpose: Sends whitelisted events (64 event types) to Datadog for product analytics with batching and retry logic

modules.name: First-Party Event Logger
modules.purpose: Logs all events (not just whitelisted) to Anthropic's first-party endpoint for comprehensive telemetry

modules.name: Feature Flag Client
modules.purpose: GrowthBook client for feature flags and A/B experiments, enabling server-controlled feature rollout

modules.name: Remote Config Polling
modules.purpose: Polls for remote configuration updates with SHA256 verification to detect tampering, enabling server-side control

modules.name: Permission Decision Engine
modules.purpose: Central permission decision engine that evaluates tool calls against the current mode, allowlists, and session grants

modules.name: Permission Mode State
modules.purpose: Manages the current permission mode (ask, auto-accept, deny) and handles mode transitions via keyboard shortcuts

modules.name: Transcript Classifier
modules.purpose: ML-based classifier that analyzes conversation context to auto-approve safe tool calls without user interaction

modules.name: YOLO Classifier
modules.purpose: The actual classifier implementation that determines whether a tool invocation is safe to auto-approve in permissive mode

modules.name: Prompt Input
modules.purpose: Main input component with vim mode, typeahead autocomplete, @mention support, and multi-line editing

modules.name: Permission Request Dialog
modules.purpose: Displays tool approval dialogs with allow/deny/always-allow options and rich tool call previews

modules.name: Message List
modules.purpose: Renders the conversation message list with streaming text, tool results, and markdown formatting

modules.name: Virtual Scrolling List
modules.purpose: Virtual scrolling implementation for large conversation histories, rendering only visible messages for performance

modules.name: Status Bar
modules.purpose: Bottom status bar displaying token count, estimated cost, active model, and permission mode indicator

modules.name: REPL Component
modules.purpose: Top-level REPL component that composes the message list, input, status bar, and permission dialogs into the full UI

modules.name: Trust Dialog
modules.purpose: First-run trust prompt that asks the user to acknowledge project directory access before proceeding

modules.name: Text Input Hook
modules.purpose: Handles keyboard input with vim mode support, permission mode cycling via Shift+Tab, and input buffering

modules.name: Exit Handler Hook
modules.purpose: Handles Ctrl+C (interrupt) and Ctrl+D (exit) with double-tap detection: first tap cancels, second tap exits

modules.name: IDE Bridge Hook
modules.purpose: Establishes a WebSocket bridge connection to VS Code or JetBrains IDE extensions for integrated editing

modules.name: Inbox Poller Hook
modules.purpose: Polls sub-agent inboxes at 1-second intervals, surfacing completed sub-agent results and notifications

modules.name: System Prompt Builder
modules.purpose: Assembles the system prompt from 15+ ordered sections with cache-control breakpoints for optimal token reuse

modules.name: Context Budget Manager
modules.purpose: Manages the total context token budget, deciding what to include and what to trim to stay within model limits

modules.name: Graceful Shutdown
modules.purpose: Orchestrates clean exit by flushing analytics, saving session state, restoring terminal settings, and killing child processes

modules.name: Plan Mode State Machine
modules.purpose: Manages plan mode v2 state transitions: plan-only, plan-and-execute, and free-form modes with tool filtering

modules.name: MDM Policy Enforcement
modules.purpose: Enforces enterprise MDM (Mobile Device Management) policies, restricting features and tools based on organizational rules
